query:
INSERT INTO public.vocabulary_words (word, definition, example_sentence, part_of_speech, difficulty, exam_type)
VALUES
  ('Forestall', 'To prevent by acting ahead of time', 'Over time, the community learned to forestall its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Foretell', 'To tell what''s going to happen in the future', 'Over time, the community learned to foretell its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forethought', 'Thinking beforehand, planning, prior consideration', 'Scholars noted a striking forethought between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forfeit', 'To suffer the loss of something by wrongdoing', 'The author hoped the new policy would forfeit tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forfend', 'To prohibit, to forbid, to avert', 'Critics argued that the plan might forfend the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forge', 'To form by heating and hammering, beat into shape', 'Her forge became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forgery', 'The production of a fake work that is claimed to be genuine', 'Critics argued that the plan might forgery the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forgo', 'To let pass, to leave alone', 'Critics argued that the plan might forgo the very problem it aimed to solve.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forlorn', 'Desolate or dreary, as in feeling, condition', 'Her forlorn became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Formation', 'Something possessing structure or form', 'Scholars noted a striking formation between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Formidable', 'Causing fear, apprehension, or dread', 'What seemed formidable at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Formula', 'Any fixed or conventional method for doing something', 'The essay highlights the formula of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forsake', 'To abandon, to give up, to leave (permanently), to renounce', 'The author hoped the new policy would forsake tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forswear', 'To renounce or deny something, especially under oath', 'Over time, the community learned to forswear its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forte', 'A person''s strong suit, talent, or skill', 'The essay highlights the forte of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forthright', 'Going straight to the point, frank, direct', 'Her forthright became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fortify', 'To strengthen a place against attack', 'Over time, the community learned to fortify its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fortitude', 'The mental strength that enables courage', 'Scholars noted a striking fortitude between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fortuitous', 'Happening by chance, often in a lucky way', '“A fortuitous discovery of an ancient artifact changed the course of the excavation.”', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Forum', 'A place for discussion', 'The essay highlights the forum of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Foster', 'To encourage or promote the development of something', '“The teacher fostered a love of reading in her students.”', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Foursome', 'A group of four, a quartet or a game played by four players', 'Her foursome became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fourth', 'Being one of four equal parts', 'The essay highlights the fourth of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fraca', 'A noisy, disorderly disturbance or fight', 'The essay highlights the fraca of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fractious', 'Irritable and quarrelsome', 'The passage presents a fractious portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fracture', 'To break, or cause something to break', 'Over time, the community learned to fracture its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fragile', 'Easily broken or damaged; delicate', 'Her fragile became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frailty', 'The condition of being frail, physically, mentally, etc', 'The essay highlights the frailty of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frankincense', 'Type of incense obtained from the boswellia thurifera tree', 'Her frankincense became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frantic', 'Desperate or wild with excitement, passion, fear, pain, etc', 'The essay highlights the frantic of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fraternal', 'Of brothers (fraternal twins)', 'The essay highlights the fraternal of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fraudulence', 'Characterized by, involving, or proceeding from fraud', 'The passage presents a fraudulence portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fraudulent', 'Intended to deceive, typically for personal gain', 'The author hoped the new policy would fraudulent tensions in the region.', 'verb', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fraught', 'Filled or charged', 'Her fraught became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fray', 'To unravel, used particularly for the edge of cloth', 'Over time, the community learned to fray its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Freemason', 'A member of a guild of skilled masons during the middle ages', 'Her freemason became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Freethinker', 'A person who forms opinions on the basis of reason', 'Her freethinker became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frenetic', 'Frantic, frenzied', 'Scholars noted a striking frenetic between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frequency', 'The rate of occurrence of anything', 'The essay highlights the frequency of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fresco', 'Painting on a moist, plaster surface', 'The essay highlights the fresco of the reform as a turning point in the debate.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Freshness', 'The state or quality of being fresh', 'Her freshness became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Fretful', 'Irritable, bad-tempered, grumpy or peevish', 'What seemed fretful at first proved central to the author''s argument.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frieze', 'A decorative band beneath the cornice of an interior wall', 'Her frieze became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frightful', 'Frightened', 'The reviewer described the tone as frightful, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frigid', 'Very cold, lacking warmth, icy', 'The reviewer described the tone as frigid, which shaped how readers interpreted the claim.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frigidarium', 'In roman baths, a room with a bath of cold water', 'Scholars noted a striking frigidarium between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'hard'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frisson', 'A sudden surge of excitement, shudder of emotion, thrill', 'Her frisson became evident only after reading the full passage.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frivolity', 'Frivolous acts, state of being frivolous', 'Scholars noted a striking frivolity between the two historical accounts.', 'noun', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frivolous', 'Silly, especially at an inappropriate time', 'The passage presents a frivolous portrait of life during the transition.', 'adjective', 'medium'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type),
  ('Frizz', 'Of hair, to form into a mass of tight curls', 'Over time, the community learned to frizz its differences through dialogue.', 'verb', 'easy'::public.difficulty, 'SAT'::public.exam_type)
ON CONFLICT (word, exam_type) DO UPDATE SET
  definition = EXCLUDED.definition,
  example_sentence = EXCLUDED.example_sentence,
  part_of_speech = EXCLUDED.part_of_speech,
  difficulty = EXCLUDED.difficulty;
